summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 基礎設施需求與電網現代化趨勢，公司獲利展望上調且股價動能強勁。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Valuation Check After Raised 2026 Profit Outlook And Strong AI Infrastructure Momentum
bullish.reason: 公司上調 2026 年獲利展望，反映出 AI 基礎設施帶來的強勁業務動能，是推動股價上漲的核心基本面因素。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Price Target Increased by 26.45% to 783.17
bullish.reason: 目標價大幅調升 26.45 %，顯示市場對其長期成長潛力與估值重估的高度信心。

bullish.title: 3 Reasons Investors Love Quanta (PWR)
bullish.reason: 總結了過去六個月股價上漲 65 % 的關鍵驅動因素，強化了市場對該股的正面情緒與投資熱度。

bullish.title: How Quanta Services (PWR) Is Riding the Utility Buildout Behind AI Infrastructure
bullish.reason: 深入分析公司在電網現代化與 AI 數據中心建設中的關鍵角色，確立了其作為基礎設施龍頭的市場地位。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Benefits from Energy-Related Infrastructure Growth
bullish.reason: Baron Asset Fund 在投資信中明確看好公司在能源基礎設施成長中的受惠地位，具備機構背書效應。

bullish.title: 3 Electrical Infrastructure Stocks With Shockingly Strong Returns
bullish.reason: 將 Quanta Services 列為數據中心成長浪潮中的關鍵參與者，進一步提升了市場能見度。

bullish.title: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In Quanta Services 15 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
bullish.reason: 透過長期回報數據展示公司穩健的成長軌跡，有助於吸引長期投資者信心。

bullish.title: Comfort Systems vs. Quanta: Which Infrastructure Stock Wins?
bullish.reason: 雖然提及競爭對手 FIX，但肯定了 PWR 在 AI 基礎設施與利潤率上的強勁表現，整體觀點偏向正面。

neutral.title: Quanta Services to Participate in Several Institutional Investor Conferences in May and June
neutral.reason: 僅為例行性的投資人會議參與公告，對股價無直接影響，屬於中性資訊。
